ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol used to represent the stock */,
  "market" TEXT /* Market where the stock is traded */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company issuing the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the company operates */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock prices are quoted */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the company's initial public offering (IPO) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the data is recorded */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Price of the stock before the market opens */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* Price of the stock after the market closes */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in the stock price from the previous day */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price from the previous day */,
  "50_day_moving_avg" REAL /* 50-day moving average of the stock price */,
  "200_day_moving_avg" REAL /* 200-day moving average of the stock price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., basic, professional, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock the alert is for */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition for the alert (e.g., 'price > 100') */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was last updated from this source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
